api_key.description: Cal.com API key. Sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>). Never logged.

base_url.description: Cal.com API base URL override for tests or proxies.

api_version.description: Value sent as the cal-api-version header on every request. Cal.com v2 versions each resource family independently (bookings officially documents 2024-08-13, schedules 2024-06-11, event-types 2024-06-14) but the engine's HTTPBase.Headers is bundle-wide, not per-stream, so exactly one value must be chosen. 2024-06-14 was verified live (2026-07-04) to route bookings/schedules/event-types/webhooks/me all to their current, correctly-versioned handlers (a real-token-shaped request returns 401 Unauthorized, never a 404 version-routing miss, on every one of those 5 resources); 2024-08-13 was verified to 404 on schedules and event-types specifically. See docs.md's Known limits.
